name: RABBIT-CAGE-BUG-17
title: session-init.py does not implement R1 branch enforcement (Inv 21-23 violated)
description: Spec invariants 21-23 (spec.md L411-437, Session-Init Branch Enforcement) mandate that on SessionStart, session-init.py runs git branch --show-current and if main/master, runs git checkout -b session/YYYYMMDD-HHMMSS then emits a green systemMessage. hooks/session-init.py (75 lines) contains NO branch enforcement code at all — only @-import injection. Worse, test-POLICY-BACKLOG-1-session-init-branch.py asserts the OPPOSITE (t1: hook left branch unchanged at main; failure reason: R1 branch creation should be removed). Spec, hook, and test are mutually contradictory.

history.note: Fixed in Wave 2 PR. session-init R1 implementation restored (BUG-17); sync-check drift color now RED (BUG-34); tests use isolated temp-dir fixtures (BUG-40); scope-guard DENIES on unresolvable feature (BUG-43); @-import handling fixed (BUG-78). 9 new e2e tests; all 39 rabbit-cage suites pass.
